steps.title: Define the quote's job
steps.content: The claim says Nikhil imagines passersby as carefree even while they work. The quotation must show both work or chores and Nikhil's sense that the worker is cheerful.

steps.title: Reject quotes about Nikhil himself
steps.content:
• Choice A: It shows Nikhil reacting to someone leaving, not imagining work as carefree.
  • Choice C: It is about Nikhil's future work plans.
  • Choice D: It expresses Nikhil's wish to go outside, not the worker's mood.

steps.title: Use work plus cheerful motion
steps.content: The relevant quotation identifies flower gathering and describes glad feet and merrily jingling anklets, making the work seem joyful to Nikhil. The answer is B.
